seedLabel: Local operator-reviewed image prompt scaffold — internal admin planning only, not client-facing or generation-ready
internalPromptLabel: INTERNAL ADMIN IMAGE PROMPT SCAFFOLD — NOT FOR CLIENT OR GENERATION USE

conceptRoles.label: Hero header concept
conceptRoles.purpose: Primary header visual framing the content topic without outcome imagery.

conceptRoles.label: Supporting education concept
conceptRoles.purpose: Educational or consultative visual supporting body content sections.

conceptRoles.label: Lifestyle context concept
conceptRoles.purpose: Neutral Bali clinic or wellness context without medical result claims.

hero_header.service_page: Editorial clinic interior photograph concept: serene licensed aesthetic clinic consultation lounge in Bali. Neutral welcoming seating, soft natural light, no patients, no before/after imagery, no treatment outcome visuals.
hero_header.faq: Clean educational header visual concept: calm clinic reception or consultation area with informational signage style, no patients, no medical outcome imagery, no transformation promises.
hero_header.blog_article: Editorial blog header concept: tranquil Bali wellness setting adjacent to a professional clinic environment. Lifestyle-safe, educational tone, no before/after or guaranteed-result visuals.
hero_header.comparison_education: Educational comparison header concept: neutral clinic consultation desk with educational materials layout, no side-by-side result imagery, no efficacy comparison visuals.
hero_header.booking_contact_support: Supportive booking header concept: welcoming clinic front desk or consultation booking area, professional and calm, no patient outcome imagery.

supporting_education.service_page: Supporting education visual concept: licensed practitioner consultation setting shown from a respectful distance, educational posture, no injection close-ups, no patient identity, no outcome demonstration.
supporting_education.faq: FAQ support visual concept: abstract educational icons or clinic brochure planning layout on a neutral desk, consultative and informational only.
supporting_education.blog_article: Blog support visual concept: educational lifestyle scene — healthy meal planning or mindful walk near clinic district, no weight-loss result imagery, no transformation narrative.
supporting_education.comparison_education: Comparison education support visual concept: balanced educational infographic planning layout on tablet in clinic setting, no superiority claims, no before/after panels.
supporting_education.booking_contact_support: Booking support visual concept: map or travel-planning desk with clinic contact card mockup, logistical support tone only.

lifestyle_context.service_page: Lifestyle context visual concept: peaceful Bali coastal or garden view evoking wellness travel context without medical claims, no patient silhouettes showing results.
lifestyle_context.faq: Lifestyle context visual concept: calm tropical resort-town streetscape near clinic district, neutral tourism context without treatment promises.
lifestyle_context.blog_article: Lifestyle context visual concept: international traveler planning consultation in bright clinic waiting area, diverse and respectful, no outcome or before/after framing.
lifestyle_context.comparison_education: Lifestyle context visual concept: serene Bali wellness environment — spa-neutral tones without treatment result implications.
lifestyle_context.booking_contact_support: Lifestyle context visual concept: airport-to-clinic journey planning scene, logistical and welcoming, no medical efficacy visuals.

altTextPatterns.hero_header: Licensed Bali aesthetic clinic {topic} — calm consultation environment, educational planning visual
altTextPatterns.supporting_education: Educational {topic} consultation setting at a licensed Bali clinic, neutral and informational
altTextPatterns.lifestyle_context: Neutral Bali wellness and clinic journey context for {topic}, no outcome imagery

visualSafetyNotes: Image concepts are prompt scaffolds only — do not generate or publish without medical and compliance review.
Avoid before/after, transformation, patient outcome, or guaranteed-result visuals.
Avoid real patient photography, identifiable faces, or injection close-ups implying results.
Use neutral clinic, education, and lifestyle-safe concepts only.
High-risk service topics require medical review before any image moves toward client review.
finalReadyGatingReasons: Image package remains internal prompt scaffold — not final-ready.
No generated image assets attached to these scaffolds.
Medical and compliance review required for high-risk topics before client exposure.
Prompt scaffolds are admin-only and must not appear in client portal until final-approved path exists.
verificationRequiredNotes: Facility, license, or accreditation visuals require verification before client-facing use.
Do not depict credential claims in generated imagery without verified source material.
Image prompt scaffolds must pass compliance scan before expansion into generation workflows.
